chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-203 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 24-10-2024 Mr. M.J @ Raees Amir Lutuf Ali Khan Zardari, Advocate for petitioner. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG and Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG. **** Statements are filed by respondents No.3&5, taken on record. Learned AAG and APG submit that no harassment has been caused by the official respondents and they will not cause the same and will act in accordance with law. In view of such statements, counsel for petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide legal protection to the petitioner and to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmad
